title: Tcl/Tk Cheat Sheet

commands.command:
package require Tk
wm title . "My Window"
button .b -text "Click Me" -command {puts "Button Clicked"}
pack .b

commands.command:
set file [open "output.txt" w]
puts $file "Hello, File!"
close $file
commands.description: Write a string to a file
commands.scenario: Write a string to a file

commands.command:
set file [open "output.txt" a]
puts $file "Appending this line."
close $file
